norm_1.content: Everyone is not allowed to smoke indoors.
norm_1.subject: everyone

norm_2.content: Customers are expected to keep noise levels low.
norm_2.subject: customers

norm_3.content: No tipping is allowed after completing meals.
norm_3.subject: no tipping

norm_4.content: People usually wait in line for the barista.

norm_5.content: Patrons should not leave personal items unattended on tables.
norm_5.subject: patrons
